precheck.description: Check handle-nulls-user-displayName has work to do
precheck.sql: SELECT EXISTS (SELECT "id" AS "id" FROM "public"."user" WHERE "displayName" IS NULL LIMIT 1) AS ok

postcheck.sql: SELECT NOT EXISTS (SELECT "id" AS "id" FROM "public"."user" WHERE "displayName" IS NULL LIMIT 1) AS ok

precheck.sql: SELECT EXISTS (SELECT 1 AS "one" FROM "information_schema"."columns" WHERE ("table_schema" = $1 AND "table_name" = $2 AND "column_name" = $3)) AS "result"
SELECT NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 AS "one" FROM "public"."user" WHERE "displayName" IS NULL) AS "result"

execute.sql: ALTER TABLE "public"."user" ALTER COLUMN "displayName" SET NOT NULL

postcheck.sql: SELECT EXISTS (SELECT 1 AS "one" FROM "information_schema"."columns" WHERE ("table_schema" = $1 AND "table_name" = $2 AND "column_name" = $3 AND "is_nullable" = $4)) AS "result"
